parameters.name: BNDDIR
parameters.help:
Binding directory (BNDDIR)

Specifies the binding directory to be created.

This is a required parameter.

Qualifier 1: Binding directory

Qualifier 2: Library

parameters.name: AUT
parameters.help:
Authority (AUT)

Specifies the authority you are giving to users who do not have specific authority for the object, who are not on an authorization list, and whose group profile or supplemental group profiles do not have specific authority for the object.

指定できる特殊値: *LIBCRTAUT, *CHANGE, *ALL, *USE, *EXCLUDE

parameters.name: TEXT
parameters.help:
Text 'description' (TEXT)

Specifies text that briefly describes the binding directory object.

指定できる特殊値: *BLANK
